projects.name: Traffic Light System
projects.desc: A 4-way intersection traffic light controller built on the 8051 microcontroller using a timer-based state machine. Manages Red/Yellow/Green phase sequencing with a pedestrian override via external interrupt and configurable phase durations stored in EEPROM.

projects.name: Vehicle Alarm System
projects.desc: Intrusion detection system using PIR and vibration sensors wired to an Arduino. Triggers a relay-driven siren on detection and sends SMS alerts via a SIM800L GSM module. Armed and disarmed with an RFID RC522 tag, with tamper-detect on power cut.

projects.name: Smart Irrigation System
projects.desc: Automated field irrigation system triggered by capacitive soil moisture sensors with a DS3231 RTC for scheduled watering windows. A relay-driven pump activates based on moisture thresholds, with LCD status display. Manual override available; dry-condition auto-override built in.

projects.name: Parking Detection Device
projects.desc: Multi-bay parking availability detector using HC-SR04 ultrasonic sensors per slot. A central Arduino aggregates slot states, displays vacancy count on an I2C LCD, and drives a green/red LED per bay. Expandable to 8 slots via PCF8574 I2C expander.

projects.name: Voting Machine
projects.desc: Tamper-resistant electronic voting unit on 8051 with 4-candidate keypad input. Vote counts are stored in external 24C256 EEPROM for non-volatile retention across power cycles. Admin-only result display via password-protected LCD mode. Firmware enforces a one-vote-per-session lock.

projects.name: Irrigation Pump for Pot
projects.desc: Compact indoor plant watering system using a resistive soil moisture probe and a 5V submersible mini-pump driven through a MOSFET switch. DHT11 monitors ambient humidity. ESP8266 hosts a Wi-Fi access point dashboard for threshold tuning and watering history logs.

projects.name: Fire Alarm System
projects.desc: Dual-sensor fire detection combining an MQ-2 smoke/LPG sensor and LM35 temperature IC. Alarm triggers a piezo buzzer and activates a relay for an external siren or sprinkler. SIM800L GSM module sends SMS backup after a 10-second debounce window on sustained alert.

projects.name: Reprogrammable Output Voltage Display
projects.desc: Precision voltage measurement unit using Arduino's 10-bit ADC with a resistive voltage divider scaled for 0–30 V input range. An LM741 op-amp buffer stage prevents load effect on the source. Results displayed on a 16×2 LCD with ±0.1 V accuracy and a configurable over-voltage alert.

projects.name: PIR Motion Street Light
projects.desc: Passive infrared motion detector using HC-SR501 with adjustable sensitivity and time-delay trimmers. Triggers a relay output for lighting or alarms. OLED display logs motion event count with timestamps from DS1307 RTC. LDR-based day/night suppression mode prevents false triggers in daylight.

projects.name: Solar Tracking System
projects.desc: Dual-axis solar panel tracker using 4 LDRs in a cross-configuration to detect light intensity differential. Two servo motors adjust azimuth and elevation via a PID control loop. Harvested panel current is logged to an SD card with timestamps for daily efficiency analysis.
